name: synergyplus-infra-cloud-native
description: Pulumi IaC (TypeScript) to deploy SynergyPlus on AWS, fully cloud-native: EKS + Karpenter, Aurora PostgreSQL Serverless v2, S3, ECR, AWS Load Balancer Controller + ALB, ACM, Route53 + ExternalDNS, Secrets Manager + External Secrets Operator, Amazon Managed Prometheus/Grafana + CloudWatch Container Insights, SES, IRSA, KMS. The all-managed mirror of infra/pulumi.
